site.title: Markuxt - Markdown-first Academic Portal Framework
site.description: Markuxt is a Markdown-first academic portal framework for labs, research groups, and knowledge communities, powered by Nuxt 3.
site.keywords: Markuxt, Nuxt 3, Markdown, Academic Portal, Research Group, i18n, Dark Mode
site.ogDescription: Build your academic portal with Markdown. Features i18n, dark mode, LaTeX, Mermaid, and responsive themes.
footer.tagline: A Markdown-first framework for building academic portals, powered by Nuxt 3.
hero.title: Build Academic Portals with Markdown
hero.description: Markuxt provides a complete theme layer for laboratories, research groups, and knowledge communities. Author content in Markdown, customize with configuration, and deploy anywhere powered by Nuxt 3.

positions.title: Contribute to Markuxt
positions.description: Markuxt is open source and we welcome contributions from the community.
positions.intro: There are many ways to contribute to Markuxt — code contributions, theme development, documentation improvements, bug reports, and feature requests.
positions.checkBack: Check back soon for new ways to get involved!
positions.contactText: Head over to the Markuxt GitHub repository to open an issue, submit a pull request, or start a discussion.
positions.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find the opportunity you're looking for.
positions.pageDescription: Contribute to Markuxt — open source opportunities for developers and designers.
research.area1Desc: Author all content in Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Members, publications, projects, positions, and news are all simple Markdown files.
research.area2Desc: Built-in support for academic portals with members, publications, projects, positions, and news. LaTeX math, Mermaid diagrams, and code highlighting included.
research.area3Desc: First-class internationalization support with per-page locale files. Ships with English and Chinese out of the box; add any language you need.
research.area4Desc: Four built-in theme presets — Seaside, Forest, Sunset, and Slate — with full dark/light mode support. Customize colors with CSS custom properties.
home.newsDescription: Stay updated with Markuxt releases, new features, and community news.
home.teamDescription: Markuxt is built by an open-source community of developers and researchers.
